cn.description:
倉頡輸入法(Cangjie Input)是一種常用的中文輸入法,由有「中文電腦之父」稱譽的台灣人朱邦復先生於1976年創製。初期只有正體中文版本,原名「形意檢字法」,用以解決電腦處理漢字的問題,包括漢字輸入、字形輸出、內碼儲存、漢字排序等。朱邦復發明此輸入法時正值他為三軍大學發展中文通訊系統之際,時任三軍大學校長的蔣緯國將軍為紀念上古時期倉頡造字之精神,乃於1978年將此輸入法重新定名為「倉頡輸入法」。
1982年,朱邦復登報公開放棄倉頡輸入法專利權,並且極力推動電腦之中文化。現今大部分作業系統,甚至一些電子辭典皆附有倉頡輸入法,為正體中文世界最普及的形碼輸入法。

倉頡輸入法適用於多種平臺,主流作業系統和大部分電子辭典均有內嵌。一些線上漢字字典也採用倉頡編碼作為檢索工具。

本程式為一眾學倉頡的用家而設計,使用者只需輸入你要查詢的字,就能自動列出該字的倉頡碼及速成碼。

感謝大家使用倉頡字典(Cangjie Input dictionary)及速成字典(Quick Input dictionary)，這兩本輸入法字典。

cn.description:
Card.Note：小某书数万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款集照片、文字、语音于一体的全能笔记App ，让您以更自由的方式记录生活。
你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以使用它的丰富照片模式，记录生活瞬间；
也可以用它来记要事、记清单、记规划、设置要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。


「Card.Note」三大笔记类型：
1、照片笔记
- 拥有单幅、六幅、九幅、自由模式
- 支持自定义布局，设计杂志感版式
- 琉璃色盘模式，支持液态玻璃效果
- 智能配色、配文，让照片讲述故事
- 支持自定义配色、配文，更加随心


2、文字笔记
- 简洁优雅的文字编辑界面
- 支持更换100余种背景色
- 支持更换10余种文青字体
- 支持根据色卡集归档笔记
- 支持添加题图让笔记更丰富
- 每份笔记均可生成精致卡片

3、语音笔记
- 一键录制，解放双手
- 支持语音转化成文本
- 支持暂停/继续播放
- 随时记录灵感、会议和故事

「Card.Note」几大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款文青字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.丰富照片样式
支持单幅照片、六幅照片、九幅照片、琉璃色盘等照片模式，可智能识别配色和配文，也可自定义配色、配文及字体样式。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.语音录入
可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

5.要事提醒
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

6.小组件功能
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

7.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

8.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

Card.Note 将实用性与美学完美结合。无论是简单的待办清单、长篇的生活随笔、珍贵的语音记录，还是精彩的照片故事，都能在这里找到最适合的呈现方式。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
小红书/微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

倉頡輸入法(Cangjie Input)是一種常用的中文輸入法,由有「中文電腦之父」稱譽的台灣人朱邦復先生於1976年創製。初期只有正體中文版本,原名「形意檢字法」,用以解決電腦處理漢字的問題,包括漢字輸入、字形輸出、內碼儲存、漢字排序等。朱邦復發明此輸入法時正值他為三軍大學發展中文通訊系統之際,時任三軍大學校長的蔣緯國將軍為紀念上古時期倉頡造字之精神,乃於1978年將此輸入法重新定名為「倉頡輸入法」。
1982年,朱邦復登報公開放棄倉頡輸入法專利權,並且極力推動電腦之中文化。現今大部分作業系統,甚至一些電子辭典皆附有倉頡輸入法,為正體中文世界最普及的形碼輸入法。

倉頡輸入法適用於多種平臺,主流作業系統和大部分電子辭典均有內嵌。一些線上漢字字典也採用倉頡編碼作為檢索工具。

本程式為一眾學倉頡的用家而設計,使用者只需輸入你要查詢的字,就能自動列出該字的倉頡碼及速成碼。

感謝大家使用倉頡字典(Cangjie Input dictionary)及速成字典(Quick Input dictionary)，這兩本輸入法字典。

hk.description:
《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

hk.description:
Card.Note：小某书数万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款集照片、文字、语音于一体的全能笔记App ，让您以更自由的方式记录生活。
你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以使用它的丰富照片模式，记录生活瞬间；
也可以用它来记要事、记清单、记规划、设置要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。


「Card.Note」三大笔记类型：
1、照片笔记
- 拥有单幅、六幅、九幅、自由模式
- 支持自定义布局，设计杂志感版式
- 琉璃色盘模式，支持液态玻璃效果
- 智能配色、配文，让照片讲述故事
- 支持自定义配色、配文，更加随心


2、文字笔记
- 简洁优雅的文字编辑界面
- 支持更换100余种背景色
- 支持更换10余种文青字体
- 支持根据色卡集归档笔记
- 支持添加题图让笔记更丰富
- 每份笔记均可生成精致卡片

3、语音笔记
- 一键录制，解放双手
- 支持语音转化成文本
- 支持暂停/继续播放
- 随时记录灵感、会议和故事

「Card.Note」几大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款文青字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.丰富照片样式
支持单幅照片、六幅照片、九幅照片、琉璃色盘等照片模式，可智能识别配色和配文，也可自定义配色、配文及字体样式。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.语音录入
可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

5.要事提醒
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

6.小组件功能
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

7.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

8.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

Card.Note 将实用性与美学完美结合。无论是简单的待办清单、长篇的生活随笔、珍贵的语音记录，还是精彩的照片故事，都能在这里找到最适合的呈现方式。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
小红书/微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

hk.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。

戴上手錶，時空驅動器啟動！
假面騎士變身音、投籃命中、功夫特效、惡搞聲音全收錄。支援 Apple Watch，一鍵發聲，讓你隨時隨地進入童年熱血世界！

勇者鬥惡龍天空系列的最終作品！
圍繞著兩個世界的冒險《勇者鬥惡龍VI　夢幻大地》在智能手機上登場！
勇者失去的記憶將兩個世界連接在一起！

本作是一次性買斷的！
在下載後，不需要再支付任何費用。
********************

◆序言
主人公是住在邊境村莊萊夫科德的少年。
和唯一的妹妹一起過著平靜的生活，
然而因機緣巧合，他受到了山之精靈的啟示，決意踏上旅程。
他所看到的“夢幻大地”的真相是……
圍繞著兩個世界的宏大冒險將在智慧手機上復蘇。


◆遊戲特色
・在冒險中會與多位個性鮮明的夥伴們邂逅
旅行武術家“哈桑”、謎團重重的女性“米蕾尤”、
喪失記憶的頑皮女孩“芭芭拉”、神之使者一族“查莫羅”、
孤傲的劍士“特瑞”。
與他們一起圍繞兩個世界，解開重重謎團吧！

・轉職系統
冒險得到一定進展後，可以在“達瑪神殿”轉職。
在“DQVI”中有16種以上的職業登場。
提升每個職業的熟練度，修得各種各樣的特技和咒文吧！
學會過一次的特技和咒文在轉職以後還可以使用哦！

・夥伴對話
可以體驗與個性豐富的夥伴們在冒險中對話的樂趣。
對話的內容會根據遊戲的進展和狀況發生各種變化！

・３６０度旋轉地圖
在鎮子和城堡中可以使地圖３６０度旋轉。
如果旋轉起來觀察的話，說不定會有新的發現？！

・ＡＩ戰鬥
值得信賴的夥伴們可以通過自己的意志進行戰鬥。
根據不同狀況使用各種“作戦”，去面對強大的敵人吧！

・賭場
說起系列慣有的娛樂要素，當然是“賭場”。
可以玩熟悉的老虎機和撲克
積攢的代幣還可以兌換各種各樣的道具，可謂是一箭雙雕！
其中似乎還有很難得到的稀有物品呢。

・史萊姆格鬥場
在《DQVI》中，不會像至今為止那樣，通過戰鬥後可以使魔物成為夥伴，
而會在旅途中讓各種史萊姆們成為夥伴。
在世界某處的叫做“史萊姆格鬥場的設施中
可以讓成為了夥伴的史萊姆參加比賽，如果獲得了比賽的勝利，還能得到獎品哦！
而且，不斷地使其成長，去爭取冠軍的話，還會發生更好的事？

・史萊姆冰壺
在任天堂DS版《DQVI》登場的“史萊姆冰壺”還健在！
在賽道上運行的史萊姆的前進路線上摩擦，
讓史萊姆按照自己想要的方向前進！
通過良好的操作，如果使其進入高得分的區域的話，
就能獲得高分哦！

--------------------

iOS7.0以上

【適用機型】
iPhone4／iPod touch(第5代)／iPad2 以上

hk.description:
《勇者鬥惡龍III　傳說的起點……》，一款無論是評價還是銷量都堪稱頂峰的佳作，終於登陸到手機平台上了！
現在只需在手機上即可體驗到完整的洛特三部曲！

本作是一個完整的幻想世界，在裡面您可以體會到每個武器的奇妙，感受到每個咒文的壯觀。只需下載一次，便不用再購買也不用再下載任何其他東西！
《勇者鬥惡龍III　傳說的起點……》有著獨立的劇情，即使沒玩過《勇者鬥惡龍I》和《勇者鬥惡龍II》也可以體會到遊戲的樂趣。

◆ 序言
在16歲生日的早上，勇者奧爾特加的孩子覲見了阿拉罕的國王，並提出希望前往討伐魔王巴拉莫斯。
在旅途的前方有著什麼樣的試煉等待著我們的勇者呢，他是否能夠完成父親都沒有實現的任務？

◆ 遊戲特色

·自由編隊系統
任意選擇角色組隊，共同挑戰令人難忘的冒險！
名字、性別、職業，一切都可以自由設置！

·自由轉職
隊員可以設置為任意職業，每種職業都會有不同的狀態、裝備、技能以及能力。
儘管勇者命中註定無法轉職，但是其他角色都可以隨意轉換。
轉職之後該角色的等級會變回1級，但是在原職業中學會的技能和能力仍然會保留下來。
從僧侶轉為戰士可以給近戰系角色追加治療技能，一切組合都可以根據情況靈活變動！

·體會超過30小時的經典RPG體驗！
在各個大陸與迷宮中提升自己的等級，學會新的技能和能力。
每個人都能夠培養出獨一無二的隊伍。
同時還有收集小徽章換取強力道具的追加小遊戲。
在主線結束之後還能夠探索新的迷宮和場景。

·簡便的直接操作
遊戲操作經過調整可以完美對應現代移動設備的縱向佈局，移動按鍵的位置也可以在單手與雙手中切換。

·與日本乃至全世界數以百萬計的玩家一起回顧這款傳奇般的RPG！由著名遊戲製作人堀井雄二先生，偉大的作曲家椙山浩一先生，以及漫畫大師鳥山明先生攜手帶來的經典。

【對應OS】
iOS12.0及以上

hk.description:
《勇者鬥惡龍 怪物仙境3 魔族王子與艾爾芙的旅程》登陸智慧型手機！
 
用「勇者鬥惡龍」系列耳熟能詳的怪物組建隊伍，享受怪物間驚險刺激的戰鬥吧！不僅能把在原野上遇到的怪物納為夥伴，還能將怪物配種，孕育出只屬於自己的怪物。
在本作中將有超過500種怪物登場！
在本作當中，過去「勇者鬥惡龍 怪物仙境」系列作品的配種系統將全面進化，可以用全新的組合，孕育出各種耳熟能詳的怪物、魔王以及初次登場的怪物並納入夥伴。

為了成為最強的怪物大師，踏上旅程吧！
 
※手機版的通訊對戰功能不支援家機版的即時對戰內容「線上對戰」。
 
************************
 
【故事】
 
◆被下了詛咒的皮薩羅與可靠夥伴們的冒險記
 
皮薩羅的魔王父親對他下了「無法攻擊怪物」的詛咒，
因此他決心成為與怪物並肩作戰的怪物大師。
 
皮薩羅在旅途中與各種怪物相遇，
並培育、配種怪物，以此來和強敵展開戰鬥。
 
立志成為最強怪物大師的皮薩羅與夥伴們的大冒險由此拉開序幕……！
 
************************
 
【本作的特徵】
 
◆以「魔界」為舞台，在不可思議的世界中展開冒險！
 
主角皮薩羅展開旅程的舞台，是怪物所統治的諸多魔界。
例如以點心構成的世界以及有大片灼熱熔岩的世界等等，將在各式各樣不可思議的世界中展開冒險。
同時魔界會隨著時間流逝產生季節與天氣變化，從而使出現的怪物和原野上的機關發生變化！
有部分怪物與地點只能在特定的季節或天氣時遇見或到達，所以每每到訪原野都會有全新的機遇和發現等待著你！
 
◆超過500種個性迥異的怪物登場！
 
各種原野和迷宮中，會有多種多樣的怪物等待著。
戰鬥時，除了能「馴服」怪物納為夥伴，怪物還有可能在戰鬥結束後爬起來希望加入隊伍。
並且還能將納為夥伴的怪物組合配種，孕育出全新的怪物。
將許多怪物納為夥伴，創造只屬於自己的隊伍吧！
 
◆包含家機版的新增內容！
 
智慧型手機版包含家機版的新增下載內容「追憶的鼴鼠迷宮」、「蝦師傅的修練迷宮」和「時之無限寶箱」。積極活用這些內容，讓冒險更加有利！
 
◆與其他玩家的隊伍切磋！
 
在通訊功能之一的「快速連戰」中，可以使用報名的隊伍與30位其他怪物大師的隊伍資料進行自動戰鬥。
還有每日一次的獎勵，可以獲得提升夥伴怪物能力值的道具，以及有機會將戰勝對手隊伍中的怪物（B級以下）納為夥伴！


************************

【推薦機型】
・iPhone11與後續機型
・iPad（第十代）與後續機型
・iPad mini（第六代）與後續機型
・iPad Air（第五代）與後續機型
・iPad Pro（第四代）與後續機型

【支援OS】
iOS 13.0以上

"""「由 SQUARE ENIX 帶來的《勇者鬥惡龍創世小玩家》現在能在手機上遊玩了！讓你能在任何地方探索由方塊組成的世界中任何角落，收集、組裝和建造各種物品並擊敗邪惡龍王！

在這款「由方塊建構 RPG」中，你將扮演有建造能力的傳奇建造者！阿雷夫嘉爾德王國因為萬魔的統治者——凶惡恐怖的邪惡龍王——而陷入黑暗中。讓我們一同經歷這趟傳奇冒險，拯救阿雷夫加爾德王國吧！

順利走到終點的話，還可以得到稀有的道具哦！！

觸擊在一定時間內顯示的與面板顏色相同的史萊姆的非常簡單的遊戲！

Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.

That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

倉頡輸入法(Cangjie Input)是一種常用的中文輸入法,由有「中文電腦之父」稱譽的台灣人朱邦復先生於1976年創製。初期只有正體中文版本,原名「形意檢字法」,用以解決電腦處理漢字的問題,包括漢字輸入、字形輸出、內碼儲存、漢字排序等。朱邦復發明此輸入法時正值他為三軍大學發展中文通訊系統之際,時任三軍大學校長的蔣緯國將軍為紀念上古時期倉頡造字之精神,乃於1978年將此輸入法重新定名為「倉頡輸入法」。
1982年,朱邦復登報公開放棄倉頡輸入法專利權,並且極力推動電腦之中文化。現今大部分作業系統,甚至一些電子辭典皆附有倉頡輸入法,為正體中文世界最普及的形碼輸入法。

倉頡輸入法適用於多種平臺,主流作業系統和大部分電子辭典均有內嵌。一些線上漢字字典也採用倉頡編碼作為檢索工具。

本程式為一眾學倉頡的用家而設計,使用者只需輸入你要查詢的字,就能自動列出該字的倉頡碼及速成碼。

感謝大家使用倉頡字典(Cangjie Input dictionary)及速成字典(Quick Input dictionary)，這兩本輸入法字典。

每位角色擁有8種獨特的攻擊方式、專屬動畫和2個被動特性。根據每次遊戲調整你的遊戲風格。

▪ 時間限制 - 快速思考，更快出擊！
每次遊戲中，你只有7分鐘來擊敗所有敵人。你為這一刻進行了殘酷的訓練。

▪ 物品與特性組合
在戰鬥中自動激活的戰略協同。時機和適應能力是勝利的關鍵！

▪ Roguelite
在一次遊戲中清除所有7個地圖和Boss，否則將被重置！但同一地圖通關3次將解鎖進度。收集金幣，構建更強大的卡組，再次挑戰！

▪ 完全支援控制器

▪ 支援12種語言

mo.description:
《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

mo.description:
《旋轉音律》是一款活用了手機陀螺儀功能的體感音樂遊戲。力求帶來前所未有的嶄新音樂遊戲體驗。 旋轉手機，感受在星河間穿梭的快感。帶上耳機，共赴鼓點與星光相伴宇宙之旅。

 =用體感，玩音樂= 
不同於傳統音遊的點按式判定，在《旋轉音律》中，你需要通過快速旋轉手機來完成部分音符的判定——就像駕駛賽車穿越急彎那樣。這將會是如同街機般爽快的音樂遊戲體驗。

 =風格多變的音樂曲目= 
眾多音遊知名曲師參與供稿並提供獨家曲目！電音、JPOP、西方歌劇、韓文流行、重金搖滾，風格多樣不單調。更有豐富新曲目定期加入遊戲曲庫。

 =夢與約定之地，愛與成長之旅= 
跟隨伊洛踏上宇宙之旅，追尋友人的足跡，邂逅不同星球的居民，拯救阿古亞星的命運。一路見證伊洛的成長吧！


※因遊戲內容涉及「性」-遊戲角色穿著凸顯性特徵之服飾或裝扮但不涉及性暗示，依遊戲軟體分級管理辦法分類為「輔導十二歲級」。

mo.description:
Card.Note：小某书数万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款集照片、文字、语音于一体的全能笔记App ，让您以更自由的方式记录生活。
你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以使用它的丰富照片模式，记录生活瞬间；
也可以用它来记要事、记清单、记规划、设置要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。


「Card.Note」三大笔记类型：
1、照片笔记
- 拥有单幅、六幅、九幅、自由模式
- 支持自定义布局，设计杂志感版式
- 琉璃色盘模式，支持液态玻璃效果
- 智能配色、配文，让照片讲述故事
- 支持自定义配色、配文，更加随心


2、文字笔记
- 简洁优雅的文字编辑界面
- 支持更换100余种背景色
- 支持更换10余种文青字体
- 支持根据色卡集归档笔记
- 支持添加题图让笔记更丰富
- 每份笔记均可生成精致卡片

3、语音笔记
- 一键录制，解放双手
- 支持语音转化成文本
- 支持暂停/继续播放
- 随时记录灵感、会议和故事

「Card.Note」几大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款文青字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.丰富照片样式
支持单幅照片、六幅照片、九幅照片、琉璃色盘等照片模式，可智能识别配色和配文，也可自定义配色、配文及字体样式。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.语音录入
可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

5.要事提醒
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

6.小组件功能
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

7.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

8.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

Card.Note 将实用性与美学完美结合。无论是简单的待办清单、长篇的生活随笔、珍贵的语音记录，还是精彩的照片故事，都能在这里找到最适合的呈现方式。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
小红书/微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

This app plus your ears equals complete freedom in writing music!

A comprehensive set of tools for any musician:

* Chord Progression: Create beautiful chord progressions with full flexibility - use inversions, sus2, sus4, 7th, 9th, and more. Enjoy live playback as piano or synth, or send MIDI directly to your macOS computer!
* Guitar Chords - helps you find and browse guitar chords.
* MIDI Keyboard: Transform your phone into a MIDI keyboard for your macOS computer (compatible with macOS Catalina and newer).
* Notation Practice: Practice reading notes in both treble and bass clefs.
* Chord Calculation: Help you learn how to calculate chords and progressions.
* Interval Practice: Practice recognizing and comparing musical intervals by ear.
* Voice & Ear Training: Simple, effective tools for voice practice and ear training.
* Harmonic Match - helps you mix tracks in key while DJing.

Plus, enjoy the macOS version included with your purchase!

mo.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

戴上手錶，時空驅動器啟動！
假面騎士變身音、投籃命中、功夫特效、惡搞聲音全收錄。支援 Apple Watch，一鍵發聲，讓你隨時隨地進入童年熱血世界！


回到童年快樂時光，成為你心中的超級英雄！

小時候的動畫片帶給我們無限的幻想和美好的夢想——變身為超人迪迦，拯救世界；化身為蒙面騎士，與怪獸激鬥；或者像悟空一樣，發射強大的龜派氣功！這些記憶，直到今天依然深深印在我們的心中。

你還記得童年時那份信念嗎？那份相信自己能變得強大的力量。現在，你可以通過這款APP再次感受到它——無論何時何地，只需輕輕一觸，變身就在眼前。

勇者鬥惡龍天空系列的最終作品！
圍繞著兩個世界的冒險《勇者鬥惡龍VI　夢幻大地》在智能手機上登場！
勇者失去的記憶將兩個世界連接在一起！

本作是一次性買斷的！
在下載後，不需要再支付任何費用。
********************

◆序言
主人公是住在邊境村莊萊夫科德的少年。
和唯一的妹妹一起過著平靜的生活，
然而因機緣巧合，他受到了山之精靈的啟示，決意踏上旅程。
他所看到的“夢幻大地”的真相是……
圍繞著兩個世界的宏大冒險將在智慧手機上復蘇。


◆遊戲特色
・在冒險中會與多位個性鮮明的夥伴們邂逅
旅行武術家“哈桑”、謎團重重的女性“米蕾尤”、
喪失記憶的頑皮女孩“芭芭拉”、神之使者一族“查莫羅”、
孤傲的劍士“特瑞”。
與他們一起圍繞兩個世界，解開重重謎團吧！

・轉職系統
冒險得到一定進展後，可以在“達瑪神殿”轉職。
在“DQVI”中有16種以上的職業登場。
提升每個職業的熟練度，修得各種各樣的特技和咒文吧！
學會過一次的特技和咒文在轉職以後還可以使用哦！

・夥伴對話
可以體驗與個性豐富的夥伴們在冒險中對話的樂趣。
對話的內容會根據遊戲的進展和狀況發生各種變化！

・３６０度旋轉地圖
在鎮子和城堡中可以使地圖３６０度旋轉。
如果旋轉起來觀察的話，說不定會有新的發現？！

・ＡＩ戰鬥
值得信賴的夥伴們可以通過自己的意志進行戰鬥。
根據不同狀況使用各種“作戦”，去面對強大的敵人吧！

・賭場
說起系列慣有的娛樂要素，當然是“賭場”。
可以玩熟悉的老虎機和撲克
積攢的代幣還可以兌換各種各樣的道具，可謂是一箭雙雕！
其中似乎還有很難得到的稀有物品呢。

・史萊姆格鬥場
在《DQVI》中，不會像至今為止那樣，通過戰鬥後可以使魔物成為夥伴，
而會在旅途中讓各種史萊姆們成為夥伴。
在世界某處的叫做“史萊姆格鬥場的設施中
可以讓成為了夥伴的史萊姆參加比賽，如果獲得了比賽的勝利，還能得到獎品哦！
而且，不斷地使其成長，去爭取冠軍的話，還會發生更好的事？

・史萊姆冰壺
在任天堂DS版《DQVI》登場的“史萊姆冰壺”還健在！

◆ 序言
在16歲生日的早上，勇者奧爾特加的孩子覲見了阿拉罕的國王，並提出希望前往討伐魔王巴拉莫斯。
在旅途的前方有著什麼樣的試煉等待著我們的勇者呢，他是否能夠完成父親都沒有實現的任務？

mo.description:
《勇者鬥惡龍 怪物仙境3 魔族王子與艾爾芙的旅程》登陸智慧型手機！
 
用「勇者鬥惡龍」系列耳熟能詳的怪物組建隊伍，享受怪物間驚險刺激的戰鬥吧！不僅能把在原野上遇到的怪物納為夥伴，還能將怪物配種，孕育出只屬於自己的怪物。
在本作中將有超過500種怪物登場！
在本作當中，過去「勇者鬥惡龍 怪物仙境」系列作品的配種系統將全面進化，可以用全新的組合，孕育出各種耳熟能詳的怪物、魔王以及初次登場的怪物並納入夥伴。

為了成為最強的怪物大師，踏上旅程吧！
 
※手機版的通訊對戰功能不支援家機版的即時對戰內容「線上對戰」。
 
************************
 
【故事】
 
◆被下了詛咒的皮薩羅與可靠夥伴們的冒險記
 
皮薩羅的魔王父親對他下了「無法攻擊怪物」的詛咒，
因此他決心成為與怪物並肩作戰的怪物大師。
 
皮薩羅在旅途中與各種怪物相遇，
並培育、配種怪物，以此來和強敵展開戰鬥。
 
立志成為最強怪物大師的皮薩羅與夥伴們的大冒險由此拉開序幕……！
 
************************
 
【本作的特徵】
 
◆以「魔界」為舞台，在不可思議的世界中展開冒險！
 
主角皮薩羅展開旅程的舞台，是怪物所統治的諸多魔界。
例如以點心構成的世界以及有大片灼熱熔岩的世界等等，將在各式各樣不可思議的世界中展開冒險。
同時魔界會隨著時間流逝產生季節與天氣變化，從而使出現的怪物和原野上的機關發生變化！
有部分怪物與地點只能在特定的季節或天氣時遇見或到達，所以每每到訪原野都會有全新的機遇和發現等待著你！
 
◆超過500種個性迥異的怪物登場！
 
各種原野和迷宮中，會有多種多樣的怪物等待著。
戰鬥時，除了能「馴服」怪物納為夥伴，怪物還有可能在戰鬥結束後爬起來希望加入隊伍。
並且還能將納為夥伴的怪物組合配種，孕育出全新的怪物。
將許多怪物納為夥伴，創造只屬於自己的隊伍吧！
 
◆包含家機版的新增內容！
 
智慧型手機版包含家機版的新增下載內容「追憶的鼴鼠迷宮」、「蝦師傅的修練迷宮」和「時之無限寶箱」。積極活用這些內容，讓冒險更加有利！
 
◆與其他玩家的隊伍切磋！
 
在通訊功能之一的「快速連戰」中，可以使用報名的隊伍與30位其他怪物大師的隊伍資料進行自動戰鬥。
還有每日一次的獎勵，可以獲得提升夥伴怪物能力值的道具，以及有機會將戰勝對手隊伍中的怪物（B級以下）納為夥伴！


************************

tw.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

倉頡輸入法(Cangjie Input)是一種常用的中文輸入法,由有「中文電腦之父」稱譽的台灣人朱邦復先生於1976年創製。初期只有正體中文版本,原名「形意檢字法」,用以解決電腦處理漢字的問題,包括漢字輸入、字形輸出、內碼儲存、漢字排序等。朱邦復發明此輸入法時正值他為三軍大學發展中文通訊系統之際,時任三軍大學校長的蔣緯國將軍為紀念上古時期倉頡造字之精神,乃於1978年將此輸入法重新定名為「倉頡輸入法」。
1982年,朱邦復登報公開放棄倉頡輸入法專利權,並且極力推動電腦之中文化。現今大部分作業系統,甚至一些電子辭典皆附有倉頡輸入法,為正體中文世界最普及的形碼輸入法。

倉頡輸入法適用於多種平臺,主流作業系統和大部分電子辭典均有內嵌。一些線上漢字字典也採用倉頡編碼作為檢索工具。

本程式為一眾學倉頡的用家而設計,使用者只需輸入你要查詢的字,就能自動列出該字的倉頡碼及速成碼。

感謝大家使用倉頡字典(Cangjie Input dictionary)及速成字典(Quick Input dictionary)，這兩本輸入法字典。

tw.description:
「Cytus II」是雷亞遊戲繼「Cytus」、「Deemo」及「VOEZ」三款全球音樂遊戲排行榜冠軍作品後，由原班人馬傾注全力打造的音樂節奏遊戲續作。


未來，人類重新定義了網路的發展和連線方式，能夠輕易地在現實世界同步存取網路世界，改變了千年以來生活的樣貌。

在巨型精神網路空間cyTus裡，一位來歷不明的傳奇DJ Æsir，其音樂有著讓人為之瘋狂的魅力，每個音符和節拍都能夠深深重擊聽者的靈魂深處。

某日，從未露面的Æsir突然宣布要舉辦第一場大型虛擬音樂祭——Æsir-FEST，邀請了當紅偶像歌手以及人氣DJ作為開場嘉賓。

宣傳公開之際即造成前所未見的討論熱潮，所有人無不想一睹Æsir的真實面貌。

而在音樂祭入場的前一小時，數以千萬計的連線瀏覽次數打破歷史紀錄，整個城市瞬間沸騰了起來，等待Æsir如同天神般的降臨……

遊戲特色：

-獨特動態判定線音樂遊戲玩法
跟隨判定線打擊拍點以獲得高分，透過五種不同特性的拍點及隨節奏動態變化的判定線，讓遊戲過程更貼合音樂，輕鬆融入並沉浸在樂曲之中。

-50首+IAP(額外付費內容)，超越250首最高質量樂曲
本次收錄樂曲涵蓋世界各地如日韓、歐美、台灣等創作者的作品，透過數位角色引領玩家遊玩如電音、搖滾、古典等不同風格之樂曲，是不辜負千萬人期待的自信力作。

-多達800種不同譜面關卡 
設計超過800種由易到難的音樂譜面，豐富的遊戲內容滿足不同等級的玩家，透過指尖的打擊體驗最刺激的挑戰和樂趣。

-與遊戲中的角色們一同進入虛擬的網路世界探險
獨特的故事系統 "iM" 將帶領玩家與遊戲中的角色逐步拼湊出 「Cytus II」背後的劇情脈絡與世界觀，在極富動態的視覺體驗中揭開故事的真實面貌。

Kazandığın parayla yeni benzin alabilir, seviyeni yükseltebilir ve daha iyi bir istasyon işletmecisi olmak için ilerleyebilirsin. Günler geçtikçe daha fazla araç gelir, talepler artar ve oyun giderek daha dikkat isteyen bir hale gelir.

Özellikler:

* Benzin istasyonu işletme simülasyonu
* Araçlara litre bazlı yakıt dolumu
* Fazla dolumda zarar etme sistemi
* Günlük kazanç, yakıt ve kâr takibi
* Seviye yükseltme sistemi
* Rekabetçi sıralama sistemi
* Basit, eğlenceli ve bağımlılık yapan oynanış

tw.description:
《身為警察》（This Is the Police）是一個策略/冒險遊戲，故事背景設定在一個螺旋式圍繞排水系統的城市。在遊戲中你將擔任堅韌不拔的警察局長傑克·博伊德的角色，你將潛入一個關於犯罪和陰謀的深刻故事。傑克會不會拿到一大筆錢安心地退休，亦或是最終會破產...還是更糟？

 - 你的任務很明確：在傑克·博伊德退休之前的180天內賺到50萬美元。怎麼賺？一切由你決定！

 - 決定，決定！《身為警察》（This Is the Police）的故事核心是一個黑暗的故事，以及你該如何破解它。無論你決定什麼，你的選擇都會影響比賽 - 以及傑克博伊德的命運。

- 《黃昏三鏢客》？弗里堡警察局局長能夠應付各種人。遊戲全看你的本事，找到壞人並決定如何處理他們。

 - 履行你的職責。作為弗里堡警察局的負責人，傑克每天都要處理各種各樣的挑戰：應對緊急情況，管理他的警員，保衛部門對抗市政廳和腐敗的市長等等。

 - 執行調查並收集針對弗里堡犯罪團伙的證據。

 - 處理城市中的競爭力量。每個人都可向你提供服務，但每一個都是有代價的。

 - 豐富而完整的配音故事：由《毀滅公爵》的配音演員Jon St. John為傑克·博伊德配音。

tw.description:
《旋轉音律》是一款活用了手機陀螺儀功能的體感音樂遊戲。力求帶來前所未有的嶄新音樂遊戲體驗。 旋轉手機，感受在星河間穿梭的快感。帶上耳機，共赴鼓點與星光相伴宇宙之旅。

 =用體感，玩音樂= 
不同於傳統音遊的點按式判定，在《旋轉音律》中，你需要通過快速旋轉手機來完成部分音符的判定——就像駕駛賽車穿越急彎那樣。這將會是如同街機般爽快的音樂遊戲體驗。

 =風格多變的音樂曲目= 
眾多音遊知名曲師參與供稿並提供獨家曲目！電音、JPOP、西方歌劇、韓文流行、重金搖滾，風格多樣不單調。更有豐富新曲目定期加入遊戲曲庫。

tw.description:
Card.Note：小某书数万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款集照片、文字、语音于一体的全能笔记App ，让您以更自由的方式记录生活。
你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以使用它的丰富照片模式，记录生活瞬间；
也可以用它来记要事、记清单、记规划、设置要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。


「Card.Note」三大笔记类型：
1、照片笔记
- 拥有单幅、六幅、九幅、自由模式
- 支持自定义布局，设计杂志感版式
- 琉璃色盘模式，支持液态玻璃效果
- 智能配色、配文，让照片讲述故事
- 支持自定义配色、配文，更加随心


2、文字笔记
- 简洁优雅的文字编辑界面
- 支持更换100余种背景色
- 支持更换10余种文青字体
- 支持根据色卡集归档笔记
- 支持添加题图让笔记更丰富
- 每份笔记均可生成精致卡片

3、语音笔记
- 一键录制，解放双手
- 支持语音转化成文本
- 支持暂停/继续播放
- 随时记录灵感、会议和故事

「Card.Note」几大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款文青字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.丰富照片样式
支持单幅照片、六幅照片、九幅照片、琉璃色盘等照片模式，可智能识别配色和配文，也可自定义配色、配文及字体样式。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.语音录入
可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

5.要事提醒
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

6.小组件功能
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

7.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

8.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

Card.Note 将实用性与美学完美结合。无论是简单的待办清单、长篇的生活随笔、珍贵的语音记录，还是精彩的照片故事，都能在这里找到最适合的呈现方式。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
小红书/微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

tw.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

圍繞著兩個世界的冒險《勇者鬥惡龍VI　夢幻大地》在智能手機上登場！
勇者失去的記憶將兩個世界連接在一起！

本作是一次性買斷的！

◆序言
主人公是住在邊境村莊萊夫科德的少年。
和唯一的妹妹一起過著平靜的生活，
然而因機緣巧合，他受到了山之精靈的啟示，決意踏上旅程。
他所看到的“夢幻大地”的真相是……
圍繞著兩個世界的宏大冒險將在智慧手機上復蘇。


◆遊戲特色
・在冒險中會與多位個性鮮明的夥伴們邂逅
旅行武術家“哈桑”、謎團重重的女性“米蕾尤”、
喪失記憶的頑皮女孩“芭芭拉”、神之使者一族“查莫羅”、
孤傲的劍士“特瑞”。
與他們一起圍繞兩個世界，解開重重謎團吧！

・轉職系統
冒險得到一定進展後，可以在“達瑪神殿”轉職。

提升每個職業的熟練度，修得各種各樣的特技和咒文吧！
學會過一次的特技和咒文在轉職以後還可以使用哦！

對話的內容會根據遊戲的進展和狀況發生各種變化！

・３６０度旋轉地圖
在鎮子和城堡中可以使地圖３６０度旋轉。
如果旋轉起來觀察的話，說不定會有新的發現？！

・ＡＩ戰鬥
值得信賴的夥伴們可以通過自己的意志進行戰鬥。
根據不同狀況使用各種“作戦”，去面對強大的敵人吧！

・賭場
說起系列慣有的娛樂要素，當然是“賭場”。
可以玩熟悉的老虎機和撲克
積攢的代幣還可以兌換各種各樣的道具，可謂是一箭雙雕！
其中似乎還有很難得到的稀有物品呢。

・史萊姆格鬥場
在《DQVI》中，不會像至今為止那樣，通過戰鬥後可以使魔物成為夥伴，
而會在旅途中讓各種史萊姆們成為夥伴。
在世界某處的叫做“史萊姆格鬥場的設施中

而且，不斷地使其成長，去爭取冠軍的話，還會發生更好的事？

・史萊姆冰壺
在任天堂DS版《DQVI》登場的“史萊姆冰壺”還健在！
在賽道上運行的史萊姆的前進路線上摩擦，
讓史萊姆按照自己想要的方向前進！
通過良好的操作，如果使其進入高得分的區域的話，
就能獲得高分哦！

現在只需在手機上即可體驗到完整的洛特三部曲！

本作是一個完整的幻想世界，在裡面您可以體會到每個武器的奇妙，感受到每個咒文的壯觀。只需下載一次，便不用再購買也不用再下載任何其他東西！
《勇者鬥惡龍III　傳說的起點……》有著獨立的劇情，即使沒玩過《勇者鬥惡龍I》和《勇者鬥惡龍II》也可以體會到遊戲的樂趣。

◆ 序言
在16歲生日的早上，勇者奧爾特加的孩子覲見了阿拉罕的國王，並提出希望前往討伐魔王巴拉莫斯。
在旅途的前方有著什麼樣的試煉等待著我們的勇者呢，他是否能夠完成父親都沒有實現的任務？

◆ 遊戲特色

·自由編隊系統
任意選擇角色組隊，共同挑戰令人難忘的冒險！
名字、性別、職業，一切都可以自由設置！

·自由轉職
隊員可以設置為任意職業，每種職業都會有不同的狀態、裝備、技能以及能力。
儘管勇者命中註定無法轉職，但是其他角色都可以隨意轉換。
轉職之後該角色的等級會變回1級，但是在原職業中學會的技能和能力仍然會保留下來。
從僧侶轉為戰士可以給近戰系角色追加治療技能，一切組合都可以根據情況靈活變動！

·體會超過30小時的經典RPG體驗！
在各個大陸與迷宮中提升自己的等級，學會新的技能和能力。
每個人都能夠培養出獨一無二的隊伍。
同時還有收集小徽章換取強力道具的追加小遊戲。
在主線結束之後還能夠探索新的迷宮和場景。

·簡便的直接操作
遊戲操作經過調整可以完美對應現代移動設備的縱向佈局，移動按鍵的位置也可以在單手與雙手中切換。

·與日本乃至全世界數以百萬計的玩家一起回顧這款傳奇般的RPG！由著名遊戲製作人堀井雄二先生，偉大的作曲家椙山浩一先生，以及漫畫大師鳥山明先生攜手帶來的經典。

【對應OS】
iOS12.0及以上

《勇者鬥惡龍 怪物仙境3 魔族王子與艾爾芙的旅程》登陸智慧型手機！
 
用「勇者鬥惡龍」系列耳熟能詳的怪物組建隊伍，享受怪物間驚險刺激的戰鬥吧！不僅能把在原野上遇到的怪物納為夥伴，還能將怪物配種，孕育出只屬於自己的怪物。
在本作中將有超過500種怪物登場！
在本作當中，過去「勇者鬥惡龍 怪物仙境」系列作品的配種系統將全面進化，可以用全新的組合，孕育出各種耳熟能詳的怪物、魔王以及初次登場的怪物並納入夥伴。

為了成為最強的怪物大師，踏上旅程吧！
 
※手機版的通訊對戰功能不支援家機版的即時對戰內容「線上對戰」。
 
************************
 
【故事】
 
◆被下了詛咒的皮薩羅與可靠夥伴們的冒險記
 
皮薩羅的魔王父親對他下了「無法攻擊怪物」的詛咒，
因此他決心成為與怪物並肩作戰的怪物大師。
 
皮薩羅在旅途中與各種怪物相遇，
並培育、配種怪物，以此來和強敵展開戰鬥。
 
立志成為最強怪物大師的皮薩羅與夥伴們的大冒險由此拉開序幕……！
 
************************
 
【本作的特徵】
 
◆以「魔界」為舞台，在不可思議的世界中展開冒險！
 
主角皮薩羅展開旅程的舞台，是怪物所統治的諸多魔界。
例如以點心構成的世界以及有大片灼熱熔岩的世界等等，將在各式各樣不可思議的世界中展開冒險。
同時魔界會隨著時間流逝產生季節與天氣變化，從而使出現的怪物和原野上的機關發生變化！
有部分怪物與地點只能在特定的季節或天氣時遇見或到達，所以每每到訪原野都會有全新的機遇和發現等待著你！
 
◆超過500種個性迥異的怪物登場！
 
各種原野和迷宮中，會有多種多樣的怪物等待著。
戰鬥時，除了能「馴服」怪物納為夥伴，怪物還有可能在戰鬥結束後爬起來希望加入隊伍。
並且還能將納為夥伴的怪物組合配種，孕育出全新的怪物。
將許多怪物納為夥伴，創造只屬於自己的隊伍吧！
 
◆包含家機版的新增內容！
 
智慧型手機版包含家機版的新增下載內容「追憶的鼴鼠迷宮」、「蝦師傅的修練迷宮」和「時之無限寶箱」。積極活用這些內容，讓冒險更加有利！
 
◆與其他玩家的隊伍切磋！
 
在通訊功能之一的「快速連戰」中，可以使用報名的隊伍與30位其他怪物大師的隊伍資料進行自動戰鬥。
還有每日一次的獎勵，可以獲得提升夥伴怪物能力值的道具，以及有機會將戰勝對手隊伍中的怪物（B級以下）納為夥伴！


************************

【推薦機型】
・iPhone11與後續機型
・iPad（第十代）與後續機型
・iPad mini（第六代）與後續機型
・iPad Air（第五代）與後續機型
・iPad Pro（第四代）與後續機型

tw.description:
"""「由 SQUARE ENIX 帶來的《勇者鬥惡龍創世小玩家》現在能在手機上遊玩了！讓你能在任何地方探索由方塊組成的世界中任何角落，收集、組裝和建造各種物品並擊敗邪惡龍王！

◆在寬廣的《勇者鬥惡龍》世界中探索旅行！
在這款「由方塊建構 RPG」中，你將扮演有建造能力的傳奇建造者！阿雷夫嘉爾德王國因為萬魔的統治者——凶惡恐怖的邪惡龍王——而陷入黑暗中。讓我們一同經歷這趟傳奇冒險，拯救阿雷夫加爾德王國吧！

◆ 在任何地方進行收集、組裝並建造物品！

勇者鬥惡龍天空系列的第二作，《勇者鬥惡龍V》隆重登場！
歷經祖孫三代的宏大故事將在智能手機上復蘇！
感受主人公所經歷的“波瀾萬丈的人生”！
本作是一次性買斷的！
在下載後，不需要再支付任何費用。
********************
◆序言
主人公是和父親帕帕斯一起在世界中旅行的少年。
少年在經歷了無數冒險後，逐漸成長成了青年，
踏上了繼承父親理想，尋找“天空的勇者”的旅程

感受主人公所經歷的“波瀾萬丈的人生”。
歷經祖孫三代的宏大故事在智能手機上復蘇。

◆遊戲特色
・怪物夥伴系統
作為敵人與主人公戰鬥的怪物，這回將成為夥伴！
只有怪物才能使用的特技和各種咒文，將做出非常出色的表現。

・夥伴對話
可以體驗與個性豐富的夥伴們在冒險中對話的樂趣。
對話的內容會根據遊戲的進展和狀況發生各種變化！

・３６０度旋轉地圖
在鎮子和城堡中可以使地圖３６０度旋轉。
如果旋轉起來觀察的話，說不定會有新的發現？！

・ＡＩ戰鬥
值得信賴的夥伴們可以通過自己的意志進行戰鬥。
根據不同狀況使用各種“作戦”，去面對強大的敵人吧！

・賭場
有老虎機、撲克、怪物格鬥場、史萊姆賽跑這些熟悉的娛樂要素。
在漫長的旅途中也勞逸結合地娛樂一下吧。
賺到的代幣還可以兌換道具，可謂是一箭雙雕！

・雙六台
在投擲骰子，使自己成為棋子前進的巨大“雙六台”中，
在駐足的格子中會發生各種各樣的事件。
裡面還有只有在“雙六”中才能體驗到的特殊事件？！
順利走到終點的話，還可以得到稀有的道具哦！！

・觸摸史萊姆
在任天堂DS版《DQV》中登場的“觸摸史萊姆”還健在！
觸擊在一定時間內顯示的與面板顏色相同的史萊姆的非常簡單的遊戲！
不過，因而玩得入了迷的話，就會忘記時間，難以自拔。真是個高深莫測的遊戲！

Sixteen diverse fishing locations, from ponds to the deep sea
Rich biodiversity, ranging from tiny isopods to massive oceanic whales, from extinct ancient species to rare deep-sea Chthonoids

“Fishow” lets you relax and enjoy the joy of fishing and the thrill of collecting in every moment

倉頡輸入法(Cangjie Input)是一種常用的中文輸入法,由有「中文電腦之父」稱譽的台灣人朱邦復先生於1976年創製。初期只有正體中文版本,原名「形意檢字法」,用以解決電腦處理漢字的問題,包括漢字輸入、字形輸出、內碼儲存、漢字排序等。朱邦復發明此輸入法時正值他為三軍大學發展中文通訊系統之際,時任三軍大學校長的蔣緯國將軍為紀念上古時期倉頡造字之精神,乃於1978年將此輸入法重新定名為「倉頡輸入法」。
1982年,朱邦復登報公開放棄倉頡輸入法專利權,並且極力推動電腦之中文化。現今大部分作業系統,甚至一些電子辭典皆附有倉頡輸入法,為正體中文世界最普及的形碼輸入法。

倉頡輸入法適用於多種平臺,主流作業系統和大部分電子辭典均有內嵌。一些線上漢字字典也採用倉頡編碼作為檢索工具。

本程式為一眾學倉頡的用家而設計,使用者只需輸入你要查詢的字,就能自動列出該字的倉頡碼及速成碼。

感謝大家使用倉頡字典(Cangjie Input dictionary)及速成字典(Quick Input dictionary)，這兩本輸入法字典。

Dive into a deep story of corruption, crime and intrigue. Take the role of gritty Police Chief Jack Boyd, and come face to face with the ugly underbelly of Freeburg, a city spiraling the drain. Will Jack reach his retirement with a nice stack of bills, or will he end up broken ... or worse?

us.description:
这是一款关于生、死、心愿与延续的App。

小时候，我以为自己是不会老去的彼得·潘，却终究敌不过健康磨损，容颜老去。
时针转动，生命流逝，但每一次心跳都可以更加有力。

有时候，生命只是一连串的数字，多少年，多少月，多少小时，多少分钟。当你意识到这个时，往往陷入巨大的虚无感之中，惶恐不能自拔。
而现在，这些数字可以成为你重塑生命的坐标，指引你走向更健康、更长久的未来。

生辰 2.0 通过 AI 分析和科学判断，不仅预测生命的终点，更为你铺就延长生命的道路：

- 探索你的生命时钟：了解当下的预期寿命，直面生命的有限与珍贵。
- 发现延寿的可能：看见改变健康习惯能为你带来多少额外的生命时光。
- 聚合健康数据：自动追踪睡眠、锻炼、压力（HRV）、经期、喝水等十余种健康数据

美国诗人纳·斯待尔在87岁那年写道：
"如果我能够从头活过，我会试着犯更多的错。
我会放松一点，我会灵活一点。
我会爬更多的山，游更多的河，看更多的日落。"

因为了解生命的终点，才能更好地珍惜当下的每一刻。生辰2.0 探索健康的可能，让我们成为你健康旅程的长久伙伴。

这是一款集照片、文字、语音于一体的全能笔记App ，让您以更自由的方式记录生活。
你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以使用它的丰富照片模式，记录生活瞬间；
也可以用它来记要事、记清单、记规划、设置要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。


「Card.Note」三大笔记类型：
1、照片笔记
- 拥有单幅、六幅、九幅、自由模式
- 支持自定义布局，设计杂志感版式
- 琉璃色盘模式，支持液态玻璃效果
- 智能配色、配文，让照片讲述故事
- 支持自定义配色、配文，更加随心


2、文字笔记
- 简洁优雅的文字编辑界面
- 支持更换100余种背景色
- 支持更换10余种文青字体
- 支持根据色卡集归档笔记
- 支持添加题图让笔记更丰富
- 每份笔记均可生成精致卡片

3、语音笔记
- 一键录制，解放双手
- 支持语音转化成文本
- 支持暂停/继续播放
- 随时记录灵感、会议和故事

「Card.Note」几大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款文青字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.丰富照片样式
支持单幅照片、六幅照片、九幅照片、琉璃色盘等照片模式，可智能识别配色和配文，也可自定义配色、配文及字体样式。

充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.语音录入
可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

5.要事提醒
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

6.小组件功能
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

7.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

8.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

Card.Note 将实用性与美学完美结合。无论是简单的待办清单、长篇的生活随笔、珍贵的语音记录，还是精彩的照片故事，都能在这里找到最适合的呈现方式。

► 9/10 GameSpot - It is more than simply pretty; Hyper Light Drifter uses its visuals to both guide and relax you. The grandest vistas calm your pulse between difficult, breathless combat sequences.

► 8.5 Polygon - Hyper Light Drifter deftly mixes contemplative moments with breakneck action.

► 5 Stars Darkstation - The top-down action-RPG Hyper Light Drifter is an amazing game: gorgeous, a fascinating world to explore, tight controls, beautiful music, and the faith in the player for you to figure things out on your own.


Echoes of a dark and violent past resonate throughout a savage land, steeped in treasure and blood. Drifters of this world are the collectors of forgotten knowledge, lost technologies and broken histories. Our Drifter is haunted by an insatiable illness, traveling further into the lands of Buried Time, hoping to discover a way to quiet the vicious disease.

Hyper Light Drifter is an action adventure RPG in the vein of the best 16-bit classics, with modernized mechanics and designs on a much grander scale. Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies.


Features:

● 120 fps gameplay on iPad Pro / 60 fps on iPhone and iPad.
● Compatible with MFi controllers.
● Game Center achievements.
● Haptic Vibration.
● From each character to subtle background elements, everything is lovingly hand-animated.
● Easy to pick up, difficult to master; enemies are vicious and numerous, hazards will easily crush your frail body, and friendly faces remain rare.
● Upgrade weapons, learn new skills, discover equipment and traverse a dark, detailed world with branching paths and secrets abound.
● Evocative soundtrack composed by Disasterpeace.
● All the content from the original game + more weapons, enemies and areas from the Special edition.

us.description:
Dragon Quest VI: Realms of Revelation , the final instalment in the Zenithian trilogy, is now available on mobile devices!
Experience an epic adventure spanning two parallel worlds!
Recover the heroes’ long-lost memories, and bring the two worlds together!

Download it once, and there’s nothing else to buy, and nothing else to download! 
********************

◆Prologue
A young lad from the secluded village of Weaver’s Peak lives a peaceful life with his little sister. But all that is to change when the mountain spirit appears before him, prophesying that only he can save the world from being swallowed by darkness. And so he sets out on a grand adventure to learn the truth of his world, and that of the mysterious phantom realm that lies beneath...

This world-spanning saga can now be enjoyed in the palm of your hand!

◆Game Features
・Join forces with a band of individual adventurers!
Amass a following of faithful friends as you travel around the riven realms. From wandering warriors to amnesiac teens, a rich cast of characters will join you in your adventures, and help you to unlock the mysteries of your clouded world!

・Vocational Education
As you progress in the game, the hero and his party will gain access to Alltrades Abbey, where they can specialise in any of over sixteen vocations. Train your skills in your chosen vocation, and learn a multitude of spells and special abilities. After you have mastered an ability, you can still use it even if you change vocation!

・Converse Freely with your Fellow Party Members!
The party chat function allows you to converse freely with the cast of colourful characters who will accompany you on your adventure. So don’t hesitate to turn to them for advice and idle chit-chat whenever the urge assails you! 

・360-Degree Views
Rotate your viewpoint in towns and villages through a full 360 degrees to make sure you don’t miss a thing! 

・AI Battles 
Tired of giving orders? Your faithful companions can be instructed to fight automatically! Use the various tactics at your disposal to see off even the toughest enemies with ease! 

・The Casino
Once again, the casino makes a comeback! While away the hours trying your hand at the poker tables or testing your luck at the slot machines, and exchange the tokens you earn for all kinds of exciting items! If lady luck smiles on you, you might be rewarded with the rarest items of all!

・The Slimopolis
Unlike previous titles, where monsters could only be recruited during battle, Dragon Quest VI lets you recruit an army of lovely little slimes as you travel around the world! Once you’ve recruited a slimy friend or two, head to the Slimopolis to test their mettle in a series of arena battles, with fabulous prizes on offer for any slime tough enough to emerge victorious! Train up your slimes, and aim for the championship!

・Slippin’ Slime
The slime-sliding minigame introduced in the Nintendo DS version makes its welcome return! Brush the ice in front of your sliding slime to guide it past perilous pitfalls and obstinate obstacles. Perfect your polishing action to hit the target, and send your score through the roof!

On the morning of their sixteenth birthday, the child of Ortega, hero of the land of Aliahan, is charged with a seemingly impossible task by the King himself: to slay the Archfiend Baramos, master of darkness!
What trials await our intrepid hero as they set out to take on a quest not even their legendary father was strong enough to complete?

◆Game Features

・Freely Customisable Party System.
Set out on an unforgettable adventure with a party of up to four characters who can be customised to your exact specifications at Patty’s Party Planning Place! Choose names, genders and jobs, and put together the team of your dreams!

・Freely Changeable Vocations
Your party members can be assigned any one of up to 9 vocations, a choice which will dictate their stats, equipment, spells and abilities.

Characters who change jobs will be returned to Level 1 and have their attributes halved, but they will retain all the spells and abilities they’ve learned, allowing you to tailor your team to perfectly suit your needs.
Turn a priest into a warrior to add healing abilities to your swordsman’s arsenal, or mix it up any other way you like! The possibilities are endless!

us.description:
Overview


DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS: The Dark Prince comes to smartphones!

Compose your very own team of monsters from across the Dragon Quest series and engage in thrilling battles against your foes. Recruit monsters from the wild world around you and combine them to synthesize new creatures as you see fit. With over 500 monsters to choose from and a revamped synthesis system to explore, you can mix and match to you heart's content to create your favorite cute critters and dastardly supervillains, as well as brand-new additions to the monstrous roll call.

Your quest to become the greatest monster wrangler of all time starts here!



Story


This is the tale of Psaro, a young man cursed, and the adventure upon which he and his trusted friends embark.

When the curse put upon him by his father, the Master of Monsterkind, renders him incapable of harming any creature of monster blood, Psaro vows to become a monster wrangler in order to break the spell. On his journey, he will befriend many monsters, train them to be stronger, synthesize powerful new allies and take on ever more dangerous foes.

Join Psaro and his friends on their campaign for monster-wrangling glory!

(The network mode Online Battles from the console version, where players battle one another in real time, is not included.)



Game Features


- Explore Nadiria, the Magical Monster Realm
On his quest for greatness, Psaro will traverse the multifarious Circles of Nadiria. Whether it be made entirely of cake and sweets or fraught with rivers of bubbling lava, each Circle plays host to a wealth of bewitching adventures. As time passes in Nadiria, so too do the seasons change, with different weather conditions tempting new monsters out of hiding and revealing paths to undiscovered areas. The Circles of Nadiria are sure to provide a fresh experience every time you visit.


- Over 500 Unique Monsters
With such varied environments to explore, you can expect them to be inhabited by a plethora of monsters. While many can be recruited in battle, occasionally a defeated monster will ask to join your team of its own accord. Befriend as many monsters as you can, then combine them to synthesize new creatures and build a unique party to your exact liking. 


- Enjoy All the DLC from the Console Version
The smartphone version includes the DLC packs from the console version: the Mole Hole, Coach Joe's Dungeon Gym and Treasure Trunks. Make the most of their unique features to enhance your adventure.


- Test Your Might Against Other Players
Register your team for the network mode Quickfire Contests to participate in automated battles against the party data of 30 other players. Once a day you can earn stat-boosting items as a prize, and the monsters from any team you defeat will be added to your roster (up to rank B monsters only).



Recommended Device Specifications

- iPhone 11 or later
- iPad (10th generation) or later
- iPad mini (6th generation) or later
- iPad Air (5th generation) or later
- iPad Pro (4th generation) or later

Graphics settings can be adjusted to improve performance. Running the game on devices that do not meet the recommended specifications can result in crashes due to insufficient memory, or other unexpected errors. We are unable to provide support for devices that do not meet the recommended specifications.



OS Compatibility

iOS 13.0 or later

tr.description:
Dive into a deep story of corruption, crime and intrigue. Take the role of gritty Police Chief Jack Boyd, and come face to face with the ugly underbelly of Freeburg, a city spiraling the drain. Will Jack reach his retirement with a nice stack of bills, or will he end up broken ... or worse? 

Manage your staff, respond to emergencies, and investigate crimes in a city on the brink of chaos. The mafia underworld maneuvers behind the scenes, sinking their claws ever deeper into the city, even as the mayor is ready to exploit every situation to his political advantage. 

Choose your approach to each situation as it unfolds. Sometimes you’ll be responding to a developing crisis at a crime scene, or negotiating with Freeburg’s crime bosses. Sometimes you’ll find yourself dodging questions in the press room, or even the occasional cross-examination in the witness box. Can you keep this pressure cooker from exploding, at least for long enough to stash away a nice retirement nest egg?

- Your mission is clear: make $500,000 in 180 days before Jack Boyd reaches retirement. How? That’s up to you!

- Decisions, decisions! This Is the Police is all about a dark story and how you react to it. Whatever you decide, your choices will influence the game – and the fate of Jack Boyd.

- The Good, the Bad, and... the Ugly? The Chief of Freeburg's Police Department deals with all kind of people. It is up to you to find the bad guys and decide how to deal with them.

- Carry out your duties. As head of Freeburg PD, Jack deals with all sorts of challenges every day: responding to emergencies, managing his officers, defending the department against City Hall and a corrupt mayor, and much more.

- Solve Investigations and gather evidence against the criminal gangs of Freeburg.

- Deal with the competing powers of the city. Everyone offers you favors, and each one comes at a price.
Rich and fully voiced story: Jack Boyd is portrayed by Jon St. John, the voice of Duke Nukem.

Rotaeno is a heart-pounding, thumb-tapping, wrist-flicking rhythm game that fully utilizes your device's gyroscope for an unprecedented musical experience.
Rotate your device to hit notes as you soar through the stars. Drop into your headphones and immerse yourself in the kick beats and stellar synths of this astronautical adventure!

tr.description:
Card.Note：小某书数万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款集照片、文字、语音于一体的全能笔记App ，让您以更自由的方式记录生活。
你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以使用它的丰富照片模式，记录生活瞬间；
也可以用它来记要事、记清单、记规划、设置要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。


「Card.Note」三大笔记类型：
1、照片笔记
- 拥有单幅、六幅、九幅、自由模式
- 支持自定义布局，设计杂志感版式
- 琉璃色盘模式，支持液态玻璃效果
- 智能配色、配文，让照片讲述故事
- 支持自定义配色、配文，更加随心


2、文字笔记
- 简洁优雅的文字编辑界面
- 支持更换100余种背景色
- 支持更换10余种文青字体
- 支持根据色卡集归档笔记
- 支持添加题图让笔记更丰富
- 每份笔记均可生成精致卡片

3、语音笔记
- 一键录制，解放双手
- 支持语音转化成文本
- 支持暂停/继续播放
- 随时记录灵感、会议和故事

「Card.Note」几大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款文青字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.丰富照片样式
支持单幅照片、六幅照片、九幅照片、琉璃色盘等照片模式，可智能识别配色和配文，也可自定义配色、配文及字体样式。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.语音录入
可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

5.要事提醒
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

6.小组件功能
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

7.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

8.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

Card.Note 将实用性与美学完美结合。无论是简单的待办清单、长篇的生活随笔、珍贵的语音记录，还是精彩的照片故事，都能在这里找到最适合的呈现方式。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
小红书/微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

tr.description:
This app plus your ears equals complete freedom in writing music!

A comprehensive set of tools for any musician:

* Chord Progression: Create beautiful chord progressions with full flexibility - use inversions, sus2, sus4, 7th, 9th, and more. Enjoy live playback as piano or synth, or send MIDI directly to your macOS computer!
* Guitar Chords - helps you find and browse guitar chords.
* MIDI Keyboard: Transform your phone into a MIDI keyboard for your macOS computer (compatible with macOS Catalina and newer).
* Notation Practice: Practice reading notes in both treble and bass clefs.
* Chord Calculation: Help you learn how to calculate chords and progressions.
* Interval Practice: Practice recognizing and comparing musical intervals by ear.
* Voice & Ear Training: Simple, effective tools for voice practice and ear training.
* Harmonic Match - helps you mix tracks in key while DJing.

Plus, enjoy the macOS version included with your purchase!

tr.description:
Finally, Heart Machine's award winning slash-'em-up arrives to iOS in the most polished and refined version yet, the Special Edition.


► Winner of the Audience Award and Excellence in Visual Art awards of the prestigious Independent Games Festival.

► 14 + nominations among the Best Visual Design, Best Audio and Best original Game categories.

► 9/10 Destructoid - A hallmark of excellence. There may be flaws, but they are negligible and won't cause massive damage.

► 9.5/10 Game Informer - The combination of soundtrack, art, and combat creates a rabbit hole worth your full exploration.

► Eurogamer Recommended - Heart Machine's slash-'em-up is punishing and precise - and incredibly beautiful.

► 9/10 GameSpot - It is more than simply pretty; Hyper Light Drifter uses its visuals to both guide and relax you. The grandest vistas calm your pulse between difficult, breathless combat sequences.

► 8.5 Polygon - Hyper Light Drifter deftly mixes contemplative moments with breakneck action.

► 5 Stars Darkstation - The top-down action-RPG Hyper Light Drifter is an amazing game: gorgeous, a fascinating world to explore, tight controls, beautiful music, and the faith in the player for you to figure things out on your own.


Echoes of a dark and violent past resonate throughout a savage land, steeped in treasure and blood. Drifters of this world are the collectors of forgotten knowledge, lost technologies and broken histories. Our Drifter is haunted by an insatiable illness, traveling further into the lands of Buried Time, hoping to discover a way to quiet the vicious disease.

Hyper Light Drifter is an action adventure RPG in the vein of the best 16-bit classics, with modernized mechanics and designs on a much grander scale. Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies.


Features:

● 120 fps gameplay on iPad Pro / 60 fps on iPhone and iPad.
● Compatible with MFi controllers.
● Game Center achievements.
● Haptic Vibration.
● From each character to subtle background elements, everything is lovingly hand-animated.
● Easy to pick up, difficult to master; enemies are vicious and numerous, hazards will easily crush your frail body, and friendly faces remain rare.
● Upgrade weapons, learn new skills, discover equipment and traverse a dark, detailed world with branching paths and secrets abound.
● Evocative soundtrack composed by Disasterpeace.
● All the content from the original game + more weapons, enemies and areas from the Special edition.

Küçük bir oyun dükkânıyla başlayın ve onu başarılı bir işletmeye dönüştürün. Gün boyunca dükkânınıza farklı müşteriler gelir. Bazıları eski oyunlarını satmak isterken, bazıları ise koleksiyonlarına ekleyecek özel parçalar arar. Amacınız akıllı anlaşmalar yapmak, doğru fiyata alım yapmak ve kâr ederek satmaktır.

Her oyun farklıdır. Bazılarını bulmak kolaydır, bazıları ise çok daha nadir ve değerlidir. Kutunun ve diskin durumu da büyük önem taşır, bu yüzden her ürünü dikkatlice incelemek işin önemli bir parçasıdır. Bir anlaşma yapmadan önce detaylara bakmalı, müşterinin teklifini değerlendirmeli ve karşı teklif vermeye değip değmeyeceğine karar vermelisiniz. Bazen tek bir iyi pazarlık bile büyük fark yaratabilir.

Daha fazla para kazandıkça dükkânınız büyümeye başlar. İşinizi geliştirebilir, daha iyi ticaretler yapabilir ve zamanla daha güçlü bir koleksiyon oluşturabilirsiniz. Oyun; ikinci el oyun ticaretini, basit pazarlık mekaniklerini, detaylı ürün durumlarını ve sıcak bir retro pixel art tarzını bir araya getirerek keyifli bir dükkân yönetimi deneyimi sunar.

Dükkânınızı büyütün, daha iyi anlaşmalar yapın, harika oyunlar toplayın ve gerçek bir CD’ci olun.

Download it once, and there’s nothing else to buy, and nothing else to download! 
********************

◆Prologue
A young lad from the secluded village of Weaver’s Peak lives a peaceful life with his little sister. But all that is to change when the mountain spirit appears before him, prophesying that only he can save the world from being swallowed by darkness. And so he sets out on a grand adventure to learn the truth of his world, and that of the mysterious phantom realm that lies beneath...

This world-spanning saga can now be enjoyed in the palm of your hand!

・Converse Freely with your Fellow Party Members!
The party chat function allows you to converse freely with the cast of colourful characters who will accompany you on your adventure. So don’t hesitate to turn to them for advice and idle chit-chat whenever the urge assails you! 

・360-Degree Views
Rotate your viewpoint in towns and villages through a full 360 degrees to make sure you don’t miss a thing! 

・AI Battles 
Tired of giving orders? Your faithful companions can be instructed to fight automatically! Use the various tactics at your disposal to see off even the toughest enemies with ease! 

・The Casino
Once again, the casino makes a comeback! While away the hours trying your hand at the poker tables or testing your luck at the slot machines, and exchange the tokens you earn for all kinds of exciting items! If lady luck smiles on you, you might be rewarded with the rarest items of all!

・The Slimopolis
Unlike previous titles, where monsters could only be recruited during battle, Dragon Quest VI lets you recruit an army of lovely little slimes as you travel around the world! Once you’ve recruited a slimy friend or two, head to the Slimopolis to test their mettle in a series of arena battles, with fabulous prizes on offer for any slime tough enough to emerge victorious! Train up your slimes, and aim for the championship!

The slime-sliding minigame introduced in the Nintendo DS version makes its welcome return! Brush the ice in front of your sliding slime to guide it past perilous pitfalls and obstinate obstacles. Perfect your polishing action to hit the target, and send your score through the roof!

◆ Prologue
On the morning of their sixteenth birthday, the child of Ortega, hero of the land of Aliahan, is charged with a seemingly impossible task by the King himself: to slay the Archfiend Baramos, master of darkness!
What trials await our intrepid hero as they set out to take on a quest not even their legendary father was strong enough to complete?

◆Game Features

・Freely Customisable Party System.
Set out on an unforgettable adventure with a party of up to four characters who can be customised to your exact specifications at Patty’s Party Planning Place! Choose names, genders and jobs, and put together the team of your dreams!

・Freely Changeable Vocations
Your party members can be assigned any one of up to 9 vocations, a choice which will dictate their stats, equipment, spells and abilities.
Though the hero’s role has been decided by fate, the jobs of all the other characters are yours to change as you see fit.
Characters who change jobs will be returned to Level 1 and have their attributes halved, but they will retain all the spells and abilities they’ve learned, allowing you to tailor your team to perfectly suit your needs.
Turn a priest into a warrior to add healing abilities to your swordsman’s arsenal, or mix it up any other way you like! The possibilities are endless!

tr.description:
Overview


DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS: The Dark Prince comes to smartphones!

Compose your very own team of monsters from across the Dragon Quest series and engage in thrilling battles against your foes. Recruit monsters from the wild world around you and combine them to synthesize new creatures as you see fit. With over 500 monsters to choose from and a revamped synthesis system to explore, you can mix and match to you heart's content to create your favorite cute critters and dastardly supervillains, as well as brand-new additions to the monstrous roll call.

Your quest to become the greatest monster wrangler of all time starts here!



Story


This is the tale of Psaro, a young man cursed, and the adventure upon which he and his trusted friends embark.

When the curse put upon him by his father, the Master of Monsterkind, renders him incapable of harming any creature of monster blood, Psaro vows to become a monster wrangler in order to break the spell. On his journey, he will befriend many monsters, train them to be stronger, synthesize powerful new allies and take on ever more dangerous foes.

Join Psaro and his friends on their campaign for monster-wrangling glory!

(The network mode Online Battles from the console version, where players battle one another in real time, is not included.)



Game Features


- Explore Nadiria, the Magical Monster Realm
On his quest for greatness, Psaro will traverse the multifarious Circles of Nadiria. Whether it be made entirely of cake and sweets or fraught with rivers of bubbling lava, each Circle plays host to a wealth of bewitching adventures. As time passes in Nadiria, so too do the seasons change, with different weather conditions tempting new monsters out of hiding and revealing paths to undiscovered areas. The Circles of Nadiria are sure to provide a fresh experience every time you visit.


- Over 500 Unique Monsters
With such varied environments to explore, you can expect them to be inhabited by a plethora of monsters. While many can be recruited in battle, occasionally a defeated monster will ask to join your team of its own accord. Befriend as many monsters as you can, then combine them to synthesize new creatures and build a unique party to your exact liking. 


- Enjoy All the DLC from the Console Version
The smartphone version includes the DLC packs from the console version: the Mole Hole, Coach Joe's Dungeon Gym and Treasure Trunks. Make the most of their unique features to enhance your adventure.


- Test Your Might Against Other Players
Register your team for the network mode Quickfire Contests to participate in automated battles against the party data of 30 other players. Once a day you can earn stat-boosting items as a prize, and the monsters from any team you defeat will be added to your roster (up to rank B monsters only).



Recommended Device Specifications

- iPhone 11 or later
- iPad (10th generation) or later
- iPad mini (6th generation) or later
- iPad Air (5th generation) or later
- iPad Pro (4th generation) or later

Graphics settings can be adjusted to improve performance. Running the game on devices that do not meet the recommended specifications can result in crashes due to insufficient memory, or other unexpected errors. We are unable to provide support for devices that do not meet the recommended specifications.



OS Compatibility

iOS 13.0 or later

You will encounter Slimes, Golems, Dragons, and more. Familiar DRAGON QUEST monsters of all sizes threaten the survival of humankind! Over the course of his many adventures, this lovable lad learns and grows.

pt.description:
"Mergulhe numa história intensa de corrupção, crimes e intrigas. Encarne o rígido Chefe de Polícia Jack Boyd e fique cara a cara com a escória de Freeburg, uma cidade em queda livre. Será que Jack vai chegar à aposentadoria com uma bolada, esperando para ser gasta, ou vai acabar durango… ou pior ainda?

Seja tragado por este polêmico conto de corrupção, crime e intriga policial. Gerencie sua equipe, atende às emergências e investigue os crimes numa cidade à beira do caos. O submundo da máfia trama por trás dos panos, fincando suas garras cada vez mais fundo na cidade, mesmo o prefeito estando pronto para explorar cada situação para levar vantagem política.

Escolha sua abordagem a cada situação à medida que ela se desenrola. Você às vezes vai reagir a uma crise se desdobrando numa cena de crime, ou negociar com os chefões do crime de Freeburg. Outras vezes, você vai se deparar se esquivando de perguntas feitas numa coletiva de imprensa, ou até mesmo num eventual interrogatório no rol de testemunhas. Será que você consegue evitar que este vulcão entre em erupção, pelo menos até conseguir um bom pé de meia para a aposentadoria? Ou será que você vai acabar atrás das grades — ou pior?"

- Sua missão é simples: Conseguir $ 500.000 em 180 dias, antes de Jack Boyd se aposentar. Como? Aí é com você!

- Decisões, decisões e mais decisões: em miúdos, “This Is the Police” é uma história sombria e como você reage a ela. Qualquer que seja a sua decisão, ela influenciará o jogo — e, portanto, o destino de Jack Boyd.

- O bem, o mal… a escória? O Chefe do Departamento de Polícia de Freeburg lida com todos os tipos de pessoas. Vai de você separar os bons dos maus.

- Cumpra com suas obrigações: Como chefe do DP de Freeburg, Jack deve cuidar das atividades cotidianas: atender às emergências, gerenciar seus policiais, brigar pelo orçamento…

- Comece resolvendo as Investigações e consiga evidências contra as gangues criminosas de Freeburg.

- Negocie com os diferentes poderes da cidade: o prefeito, a máfia, a igreja, o sindicato dos trabalhadores. Todos oferecem favores, mas tudo tem seu preço.

- Dublagem feita totalmente pelo glorioso Jon St. John (vulgo: a voz do Duke Nukem).

pt.description:
Rotaeno is a heart-pounding, thumb-tapping, wrist-flicking rhythm game that fully utilizes your device's gyroscope for an unprecedented musical experience.
Rotate your device to hit notes as you soar through the stars. Drop into your headphones and immerse yourself in the kick beats and stellar synths of this astronautical adventure!

=A Revolutionary Way to Experience Music=
What sets Rotaeno apart is all in the name - rotation! Building on the basic controls of more traditional rhythm games, Rotaeno includes notes that require smooth turns and rapid rotations to hit, making it feel like you're drifting in a highspeed interstellar stunt race. It's a real arcade experience - in the palm of your hand!

=Multi Genre Music and Beats=
Rotaeno is loaded with exclusive tracks from renowned rhythm game composers. From EDM to JPOP, KPOP to Opera, the stylistically diverse song collection contains a future favorite song for every music lover! More songs are already planned for future updates and will be released on a regular basis.

=A Journey to Find the Promised Land, Love, and Ourselves=
Follow Ilot, our heroine, on a cosmic journey through the stars, and witness her growth as she sets out on her own. Follow in the footsteps of a friend, meet locals on different planets, and save the future of Aquaria!

Pompacı Simülatör, kendi benzin istasyonunu yönettiğin eğlenceli ve dikkat isteyen bir işletme simülasyon oyunudur. Gelen araçların istediği litreye en yakın dolumu yap, paranı kazan, benzinin tükenmeden günü tamamla ve işletmeni adım adım büyüt.

Her müşteri farklı miktarda benzin ister. Senin görevin doğru zamanda dolumu durdurmak, fazla yakıt harcamadan kazancını artırmak ve gün sonunda kâr etmektir. Fazla dolum yaparsan müşteri yalnızca istediği litre kadar ödeme yapar; bu yüzden dikkat, zamanlama ve doğru kararlar çok önemlidir.

Kazandığın parayla yeni benzin alabilir, seviyeni yükseltebilir ve daha iyi bir istasyon işletmecisi olmak için ilerleyebilirsin. Günler geçtikçe daha fazla araç gelir, talepler artar ve oyun giderek daha dikkat isteyen bir hale gelir.

Özellikler:

* Benzin istasyonu işletme simülasyonu
* Araçlara litre bazlı yakıt dolumu
* Fazla dolumda zarar etme sistemi
* Günlük kazanç, yakıt ve kâr takibi
* Seviye yükseltme sistemi
* Rekabetçi sıralama sistemi

pt.description:
Card.Note：小某书数万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 

这是一款集照片、文字、语音于一体的全能笔记App ，让您以更自由的方式记录生活。
你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 
也可以使用它的丰富照片模式，记录生活瞬间；
也可以用它来记要事、记清单、记规划、设置要事提醒；
还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。


「Card.Note」三大笔记类型：
1、照片笔记
- 拥有单幅、六幅、九幅、自由模式
- 支持自定义布局，设计杂志感版式
- 琉璃色盘模式，支持液态玻璃效果
- 智能配色、配文，让照片讲述故事
- 支持自定义配色、配文，更加随心


2、文字笔记
- 简洁优雅的文字编辑界面
- 支持更换100余种背景色
- 支持更换10余种文青字体
- 支持根据色卡集归档笔记
- 支持添加题图让笔记更丰富
- 每份笔记均可生成精致卡片

3、语音笔记
- 一键录制，解放双手
- 支持语音转化成文本
- 支持暂停/继续播放
- 随时记录灵感、会议和故事

「Card.Note」几大特点：

1.极简设计
循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。

2.文青定制
精选了 10 款文青字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。

3.丰富照片样式
支持单幅照片、六幅照片、九幅照片、琉璃色盘等照片模式，可智能识别配色和配文，也可自定义配色、配文及字体样式。

3.全局卡片化
充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。

4.语音录入
可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。

5.要事提醒
可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。

6.小组件功能
支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。

7.iCloud云同步
支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。

8.深色模式
全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。

Card.Note 将实用性与美学完美结合。无论是简单的待办清单、长篇的生活随笔、珍贵的语音记录，还是精彩的照片故事，都能在这里找到最适合的呈现方式。

感谢下载，生活愉快。

如有问题或建议，请联系开发者
小红书/微博：土味文艺开发者
邮箱：yande18@126.com

pt.description:
Finalmente, o premiado slash-'em-up da Heart Machine chega ao iOS na sua versão mais polida e refinada de sempre, a Special Edition.


► Vencedor dos prémios "Audience Award" e "Excellence in Visual Art" do prestigiado Independent Games Festival.

► Mais de 14 nomeações nas categorias Melhor Design Visual, Melhor Áudio e Melhor Jogo Original.

► 9/10 Destructoid « Um exemplo de excelência. Podem existir falhas, mas são insignificantes e não causam granes estragos. »

► 9,5/10 Game Informer « A combinação da banda sonora, dos gráficos e dos combates cria um ambiente complexo que vale a pena explorar. »

► Recomendado pela Eurogamer « O slash-'em-up da Heart Machine é esgotante e preciso - e incrivelmente belo. »

► 9/10 GameSpot « É mais do que simplesmente bonito; o Hyper Light Drifter usa os seus gráficos para te guiar e relaxar. As paisagens magníficas desaceleram a pulsação entre sequências de combate difíceis, que te deixam sem fôlego. »

► 8,5 Polygon « O Hyper Light Drifter combina habilmente momentos contemplativos com ação vertiginosa. »

► 5 Estrelas Darkstation « O RPG de ação, visto de cima, Hyper Light Drifter é um jogo espantoso: lindo, um mundo fascinante para explorar, controlos sem falhas, música magnífica e a confiança no jogador que o fará descobrir as coisas sozinho. »


Os ecos de um passado sombrio e violento ressoam através das terras selvagens, repletas de tesouros e sangue. Os Drifters deste mundo são os colecionadores de conhecimentos esquecidos, tecnologias perdidas e histórias desfeitas. O nosso Drifter é assombrado por uma doença insaciável, viajando pelas terras do Tempo Sepultado, na esperança de descobrir uma forma de apaziguar a doença cruel.

Hyper Light Drifter é um RPG de ação/aventura ao estilo dos melhores clássicos de 16 bits, com mecânicas modernizadas e gráficos numa escala grandiosamente superior. Explora um vasto mundo deslumbrante e em ruínas, repleto de perigos e tecnologias esquecidas.


Características:

● Jogabilidade de 120 fps no iPad Pro / 60 fps no iPhone e iPad.
● Compatível com controladores MFi.
● Conquistas no Game Center.
● Vibração táctil.
● Desde as personagens aos elementos subtis do cenário, tudo foi concebido à mão com o maior dos afetos.
● Fácil de aprender, difícil de dominar; os inimigos são cruéis e numerosos, os perigos podem esmagar facilmente o teu corpo frágil e os rostos amigáveis são raros.
● Melhora as armas, aprende novas habilidades, descobre equipamentos e atravessa um mundo sombrio e detalhado onde abundam encruzilhadas e segredos.
● Banda sonora evocativa criada por Disasterpeace.
● Todo o conteúdo do jogo original + mais armas, inimigos e áreas da Special Edition.

pt.description:
Dragon Quest VI: Realms of Revelation , o episódio final da trilogia Zenithiana, já está disponível para dispositivos móveis!
Viva uma aventura épica que se estende por dois mundos paralelos!
Recupere as memórias do herói há muito perdidas e una os dois mundos!

Baixe apenas uma vez - não há nada mais para comprar, nem para download posterior! 
********************

◆Prólogo
Um jovem vive pacificamente com a irmã caçula no vilarejo isolado de Weaver’s Peak. Mas tudo isso muda quando o espírito da montanha aparece diante do rapaz, profetizando que apenas ele pode salvar o mundo de ser engolido pela escuridão. E assim, o jovem parte em uma grande aventura para aprender a verdade a respeito do seu mundo, e ainda do misterioso reino fantasma que existe abaixo dele...

Agora é possível viver esta saga por diferentes mundos bem na palma da sua mão!


◆Recursos do jogo
・Una forças com um bando de aventureiros sem igual!
Colecione amigos leais conforme viaja pelos reinos separados. De guerreiros viajantes a adolescentes com amnésia, um vasto elenco de personagens irá se juntar às suas aventuras e ajudar você a desvendar os mistérios do seu mundo ensombrecido!

・Educação vocacional
Conforme avançam no jogo, o herói e seu grupo terão acesso a Alltrades Abbey, onde podem se especializar em uma das mais de dezesseis vocações existentes. Treine suas habilidades na vocação escolhida e aprenda uma variedade de feitiços e talentos especiais. Após ter dominado um talento você poderá sempre usá-lo, mesmo se mudar de vocação!

・Converse livremente com seus colegas de grupo!
A função de bate-papo em grupo permite conversar livremente com o rico elenco de personagens que acompanhará você em sua aventura. Não hesite em buscar conselhos com eles e até jogar conversa fora, sempre que sentir vontade! 

・Visualização em 360 graus
Gire o campo de visão nas cidades e vilarejos por 360 graus completos, para ter certeza de não perder nenhum detalhe! 

・Batalhas com IA
Cansou-se de dar ordens? Seus leais companheiros podem ser orientados a lutar automaticamente! Use as várias táticas à disposição para se livrar com facilidade dos inimigos mais ferrenhos! 

・O Cassino
Mais uma vez o cassino está de volta! Gaste horas em busca da melhor mão nas mesas de pôquer ou tentando a sorte nas máquinas caça-níqueis, e troque os tokens que ganhar por todo tipo de itens interessantes! Se a Fortuna lhe sorrir, você pode até levar os itens mais raros de recompensa!

・A Slimopolis
Diferente dos títulos anteriores, em que os monstros podiam ser recrutados apenas durante a batalha, Dragon Quest VI permite a você recrutar um exército de pequenos slimes adoráveis enquanto viaja mundo afora! Assim que tiver recrutado um ou dois amigos viscosos, vá para Slimopolis e teste a coragem deles em uma série de batalhas na arena, com direito a prêmios fabulosos ao alcance de qualquer slime durão o bastante para ser vitorioso do combate! Treine seus slimes e corra atrás do título de campeão!


・Slime deslizante
O minijogo de deslizar slimes introduzido na versão para Nintendo DS faz um bem-vindo retorno! Escove o gelo em frente ao seu slime deslizante para guiá-lo por entre armadilhas ardilosas e obstáculos obstinados. Aperfeiçoe sua técnica de polimento para atingir o alvo e leve sua pontuação às alturas!

pt.description:
DRAGON QUEST III: As Sementes da Salvação. Um dos mais aclamados e vendidos jogos da franquia finalmente chegou nos dispositivos móveis! Agora todos os três episódios da Trilogia de Erdrick podem ser jogados na palma da sua mão!

Cada arma maravilhosa, magia espetacular e adversário incrível deste rico mundo de fantasia é seu para descobrir em um único pacote individual. Baixe uma vez, e não tem mais nada para comprar, nem mais nada para baixar!
DRAGON QUEST III: As Sementes da Salvação tem uma história independente e pode ser aproveitado sem antes ter jogado DRAGON QUEST I ou DRAGON QUEST II. 
※O texto do jogo só está disponível em inglês.

◆ Prólogo
Na manhã do seu décimo sexto aniversário, o filho de Ortega, herói da terra de Aliahan, é encarregado de uma tarefa aparentemente impossível pelo próprio rei: eliminar o Arquidemônio Baramos, mestre da escuridão!
Que desafios aguardam nosso intrépido herói enquanto ele parte para encarar uma missão que nem seu lendário pai foi forte o suficiente para completar?

◆Características do jogo

・Sistema de equipe livremente personalizável
Parta em uma aventura inesquecível com um grupo de até quatro personagens que pode ser personalizado sob suas especificações exatas no Planejamento da Patty! Escolha nomes, gênero e classes, e monte a equipe dos seus sonhos!

・Vocações livremente alteráveis
Os membros da sua equipe podem receber qualquer uma de até 9 vocações, uma escolha que vai ditar seus atributos, equipamentos, magias e habilidades.
Embora o papel do herói tenha sido decidido pelo destino, os papéis de todos os outros personagens são seus para alterar como achar melhor.
Personagens que mudarem de classe voltarão ao nível 1 e terão seus atributos reduzidos pela metade, mas vão continuar com todas as magias e habilidades que aprenderam, permitindo que você modele seu time para se adequar perfeitamente às suas necessidades.
Transforme um padre em guerreiro para adicionar habilidades de cura ao arsenal do seu espadachim, ou misture do jeito que quiser! As possibilidades são infinitas!

・Experimente um RPG épico com mais de 30 horas de jogo e com funções acrescentadas ao lançamento original!   
Viaje por múltiplos continentes e masmorras enquanto sobe de nível e libera novas magias e habilidades.  O sistema de personalidade muda como seu personagem cresce, tornando sua equipe sempre única.  Minijogos como a coleção de medalhas que liberam poderosos novos itens que não estavam disponíveis no lançamento original. Descubra e explore locais e masmorras bônus após completar a trama principal.   

・Controles simples e intuitivos
Os controles do jogo são feitos para funcionar perfeitamente com o layout vertical de qualquer dispositivo móvel moderno, e a posição dos botões de movimento pode ser alterada para facilitar o jogo tanto com uma quanto com duas mãos.

・Experimente a série que vendeu milhões. amada tanto no Japão quanto além, e veja como os grandes talentos do criador da série, Yuji Horii, foram combinados com os sons de sintetizador revolucionários de Koichi Sugiyama, e com as incrivelmente populares ilustrações de mangá de Akira Toriyama (Dragon Ball) para criar uma sensação dos videogames.

[Compatibilidade com sistema operacional]
iOS 12.0 ou superior

pt.description:
Overview


DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS: The Dark Prince comes to smartphones!

Compose your very own team of monsters from across the Dragon Quest series and engage in thrilling battles against your foes. Recruit monsters from the wild world around you and combine them to synthesize new creatures as you see fit. With over 500 monsters to choose from and a revamped synthesis system to explore, you can mix and match to you heart's content to create your favorite cute critters and dastardly supervillains, as well as brand-new additions to the monstrous roll call.

Your quest to become the greatest monster wrangler of all time starts here!



Story


This is the tale of Psaro, a young man cursed, and the adventure upon which he and his trusted friends embark.

When the curse put upon him by his father, the Master of Monsterkind, renders him incapable of harming any creature of monster blood, Psaro vows to become a monster wrangler in order to break the spell. On his journey, he will befriend many monsters, train them to be stronger, synthesize powerful new allies and take on ever more dangerous foes.

Join Psaro and his friends on their campaign for monster-wrangling glory!

(The network mode Online Battles from the console version, where players battle one another in real time, is not included.)



Game Features


- Explore Nadiria, the Magical Monster Realm
On his quest for greatness, Psaro will traverse the multifarious Circles of Nadiria. Whether it be made entirely of cake and sweets or fraught with rivers of bubbling lava, each Circle plays host to a wealth of bewitching adventures. As time passes in Nadiria, so too do the seasons change, with different weather conditions tempting new monsters out of hiding and revealing paths to undiscovered areas. The Circles of Nadiria are sure to provide a fresh experience every time you visit.


- Over 500 Unique Monsters
With such varied environments to explore, you can expect them to be inhabited by a plethora of monsters. While many can be recruited in battle, occasionally a defeated monster will ask to join your team of its own accord. Befriend as many monsters as you can, then combine them to synthesize new creatures and build a unique party to your exact liking. 


- Enjoy All the DLC from the Console Version
The smartphone version includes the DLC packs from the console version: the Mole Hole, Coach Joe's Dungeon Gym and Treasure Trunks. Make the most of their unique features to enhance your adventure.


- Test Your Might Against Other Players
Register your team for the network mode Quickfire Contests to participate in automated battles against the party data of 30 other players. Once a day you can earn stat-boosting items as a prize, and the monsters from any team you defeat will be added to your roster (up to rank B monsters only).



Recommended Device Specifications

- iPhone 11 or later
- iPad (10th generation) or later
- iPad mini (6th generation) or later
- iPad Air (5th generation) or later
- iPad Pro (4th generation) or later

Graphics settings can be adjusted to improve performance. Running the game on devices that do not meet the recommended specifications can result in crashes due to insufficient memory, or other unexpected errors. We are unable to provide support for devices that do not meet the recommended specifications.



OS Compatibility

iOS 13.0 or later

Os temíveis monstros que você enfrenta agora podem virar seus amigos, dando a você acesso a magias e capacidades únicas, além de uma série de possibilidades estratégicas!

・Converse livremente com seus companheiros de grupo!
A função bate-papo de grupo permite que você converse livremente com o elenco de personagens coloridos que irão acompanhá-lo em suas aventuras. Por isso, não hesite em pedir conselhos ou bater um papo com eles sempre que der vontade!

・Perspectivas de 360 graus
Você pode alterar o seu ponto de vista para qualquer lado que quiser, para ter certeza que não perderá nada!

・Batalhas com IA
Cansado de dar ordens? Seus leais companheiros podem ser instruídos a lutar automaticamente!
Use as diversas táticas à sua disposição para liquidar com facilidade até mesmo seus inimigos mais difíceis!

・O cassino
Com máquinas caça-níqueis, pôquer, a arena de monstros e as empolgantes corridas de meleca do nojentódromo, o cassino certamente irá proporcionar a você um pouco de alívio quando as pressões das aventuras forem grandes demais.
Melhor ainda, você pode trocar as fichas que ganhar por todos os tipos de itens, o que faz do lazer algo que vale realmente a pena!

・Tesouros e alçapões
Pegue os dados e jogue-os para avançar por tabuleiros especialmente projetados e divirta-se com diversos eventos empolgantes!
Algumas das coisas que você verá não estarão disponíveis em nenhum outro lugar. E se você conseguir chegar ao fim, poderá ganhar prêmios sensacionais!

・Bata na Meleca está de volta!
Bata na Meleca, o minijogo de golpear meleca apresentado na versão para Nintendo DS, voltou com tudo! Bata nas melecas dentro do limite de tempo para ganhar pontos nesse jogo maluco, supersimples e viciante!

・Controles simples e intuitivos
Os controles do jogo foram projetados para funcionar perfeitamente com o design vertical de qualquer dispositivo móvel moderno, e a posição do botão de movimento pode ser mudada para facilitar o jogo tanto com uma como com duas mãos.

・Experimente o RPG lendário que é amado por milhões no Japão e em todo o mundo! Criado por um lendário trio, com as ideias do mestre-criador Yuji Horii, pelas composições e orquestrações para sintetizador feitas por Koichi Sugiyama, e pela arte do mestre do mangá Akira Toriyama (Dragon Ball).
--------------------

A tão esperada continuação do DRAGON QUEST original está disponível para dispositivos móveis agora! Descubra novas terras e explore vastos calabouços neste RPG clássico e retro. 

Entre em um mundo fantástico de espadas, magia e monstros com um pacote standalone!
Faça o download uma vez e não terá mais nada para comprar e mais nada para baixar!
※Texto dentro do jogo disponível somente em inglês.
********************


◆ Prólogo
Um século se passou desde os eventos do primeiro DRAGON QUEST e, durante esse tempo, os descendentes do herói de Alefgard construíram três novas nações. Mas a paz que eles conheceram já não existe mais. Exércitos de demônios trazidos das sombras pelo caído Sumo Sacerdote Hargon levaram a terra à beira da ruína mais uma vez. Agora, o jovem príncipe de Midenhall deve encontrar os outros dois descendentes de Erdrick, para que, juntos, derrotem o abominável Hargon e devolvam a paz ao seu mundo.

◆ Características do jogo

・Vivencie a segunda história da trilogia da saga de Erdrick. Se esta é a sua primeira incursão à série, DRAGON QUEST II possui sua própria história, sendo um ótimo lugar para se começar.

・Explore vastos calabouços cheios de perigo e monstros únicos. Viaje por vários continentes a bordo do seu navio em uma das primeiras aventuras de mundo aberto, enquanto encontra novos tesouros e sobe o nível dos seus personagens.

・Controles simples e intuitivos
Os controles do jogo são projetados para funcionar perfeitamente com o layout vertical de qualquer dispositivo móvel moderno e a posição do botão de movimento pode ser alterada para facilitar tanto para quem joga com uma mão quanto para quem joga com duas mãos.

・Experimente o lendário RPG amado por milhões no Japão e no mundo inteiro! Criado por um trio lendário, incluindo o criador mestre Yuji Horii, a revolucionária trilha sonora sintetizada e orquestrada por Koichi Sugiyama, e a arte do mestre dos mangás, o artista Akira Toriyama (de Dragon Ball).

[Compatibilidade com sistema operacional]
iOS 12.0 ou superior

A paz na bela Alefgard foi estilhaçada pelo aparecimento do nefasto mestre da noite, conhecido como Dragonlord, e a Esfera de Luz, que por tanto tempo manteve as forças das trevas sob controle, foi roubada!

Torne-se o descendente do herói lendário Erdrick e embarque em uma jornada épica através do reino histórico de Alefgard, enfrentando inimigos assustadores, e quebra-cabeças desconcertantes, a caminho do covil do terrível Dragonlord!

・Controles simples e intuitivos
